# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Scene change
- [ ] Asset change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Unity Assets Changed

List every changed scene, Prefab, material, input action, model, audio file, or large asset.

- 

## LFS Locks

- [ ] I locked high-conflict Unity assets before editing.
- [ ] I checked `git lfs locks`.
- [ ] I unlocked assets that no longer need to stay locked.
- [ ] No lockable Unity assets were changed.

## Testing

- [ ] Project opens in Unity `2022.3.57f1c1`.
- [ ] Changed scene or gameplay path was tested in Play Mode.
- [ ] VR/PICO device testing was done when relevant.
- [ ] No unrelated scenes were re-saved.

## Notes for Reviewer

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to.
